metadata.title: Town Basket — Groceries delivered
metadata.description: Order groceries from your neighbourhood supermarket, delivered fast within 5 km.

footer.copyright: © {year} Town Basket — fresh groceries, delivered fast within 5 km.

cartIndicator.aria: Cart, {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

location.gateBody: We deliver groceries within 5 km of our store. Drop a pin on the map (or use your current location) so we can check if you’re in range.
location.errorCheck: We couldn’t check your location right now. Please try again, or enter coordinates manually.
location.errorSetFirst: Please set your location on the map first.
location.nsTitle: Sorry, we don’t deliver to your location yet
location.nsRangeWithStore: We currently deliver within 5 km of our store ({store}).
location.nsRangeNoStore: We currently deliver within 5 km of our store.
location.nsDistance: You’re about {distance} away, just outside our {radius} delivery range.
location.denied: Location permission was denied. Please allow location access and try again.
location.pinnedAdjust: Pinned: {lat}, {lng} · tap the map or drag the pin to adjust.
location.mapFailed: The map couldn’t load. You can still pin your location:
location.tapToDrop: Tap the map to drop a pin, or use your current location.

product.outOfStockNotice: This product is out of stock right now.

home.categoriesEmpty: Categories will appear here once the catalogue is loaded.
home.productsEmpty: No products to show yet. The catalogue API may still be starting up — try refreshing in a moment.

cart.title: 🧺 Your cart
cart.outOfStockRemove: Out of stock — remove to continue
cart.minOrderNotice: Minimum order is {min}. Add {needed} more to checkout.
cart.someOutOfStock: Some items are out of stock. Remove them to continue.
cart.couldNotUpdate: Could not update your cart. Please try again.
cart.noLongerAvailableRemove: No longer available — remove to continue
cart.onlyNLeft: Only {count} left — reduce quantity to continue
cart.someNoLongerAvailable: Some items are no longer available. Remove them to continue.
cart.someShortage: Some items don’t have enough stock for the quantity you chose. Reduce the quantity to continue.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.addressPlaceholder: Flat / house no, building, street, area, landmark
checkout.mapHint: Drop a pin on the map (or use your current location). We re-check that you’re within range before placing the order.
checkout.codHint: Pay in cash when your order arrives.
checkout.signInPrompt: Please sign in to place your order.
checkout.notServiceable: Sorry, {store} doesn’t deliver to this address yet (outside the delivery range). Please choose a different location.
checkout.errorStock: Some items just sold out or stock changed. Please review your cart and try again.
checkout.errorInvalid: We couldn’t place this order — the store may be closed, an item may be unavailable, the total may have changed, or you’re below the minimum. Please review your cart and retry.
checkout.errorGeneric: Something went wrong placing your order. Please try again.
checkout.minOrderNotice: Minimum order is {min}. Add {needed} more to checkout.
checkout.someOutOfStockEdit: Some items are out of stock. Please <link>edit your cart</link> first.
checkout.someNoLongerAvailableEdit: Some items are no longer available. Please <link>edit your cart</link> first.
checkout.someShortageEdit: Some items don’t have enough stock for the quantity you chose. Please <link>edit your cart</link> first.

login.devHintPhone: Local dev: no SMS is sent — enter any 6-digit code on the next step.
login.couldNotSend: Could not send the code. Please try again.
login.smsHintVerify: Enter the code from the SMS we just sent.
login.devHintCode: Local dev: any 6-digit code is accepted.
login.couldNotVerify: We could not verify that number. Please try again.
login.signInError: Something went wrong signing you in. Please try again.

profile.errorRange: Please enter a name between 1 and 80 characters.
profile.errorUpdate: Could not update your name. Please try again.

addresses.couldNotLoad: Could not load your saved addresses.
addresses.couldNotSave: Could not save the address. Please try again.
addresses.couldNotDelete: Could not delete that address. Please try again.
addresses.couldNotUpdateDefault: Could not update the default address.

orders.couldNotReorder: Could not start a reorder. Some items may be unavailable.
orders.none: You haven’t placed any orders yet.

order.deliveryCodeHint: Share this code with the delivery person at handover.
order.cancelledNotice: This order was cancelled. Any reserved items have been released.
order.couldNotLoad: Could not load your order. Please try again.
order.deliveryCodeHintOnTheWay: Your order is on the way. Share this code with the delivery person at handover.

search.prompt: Type a product name in the search bar above to find groceries.
search.noMatch: No products matched “{q}”. Try a different search.

category.noProducts: No products in this category yet.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: We couldn’t find what you were looking for.

offline.title: You’re offline
offline.body: Town Basket needs an internet connection to load fresh groceries. Please reconnect and try again — pages you’ve already visited may still be available.
